description: A crash-course in the hidden history of robber barons, fascism, and organized crime government in the twentieth century.  While very well made, there are some historical weaknesses.  (1)  The role of the Khazars and the British in American history are not really delved into, yet essential.  (2)  While it is true that the concentration camps were used for labor forces in German factories, the historical fact is that the 'inmate' laborers (with possibly the exception of actual criminals) were paid .  While underpayment may be a form of slavery itself, the long ago discredited "Holocaust" mythology is indirectly perpetuated. Both of these gaps can be filled with the materials available below. https://archive.org/details/BlackNobility-CommitteeOf300-Globalism-KhazarZionist-Oligarchs- https://archive.org/details/CongressionalRecordRegardingBritish-khazarZionistWorldGovernmentAndTha Dodd Report to the Reece Committee on Foundations - 1954 - Robber Baron Hijacking of the USA - Christopher Dodd https://archive.org/details/TheKhazarianInvasion-ResearchPackageV2_973 https://archive.org/details/christian-zionismAndPoliticalZionism-British-rothschildHijackOfUs https://archive.org/details/ZionismAndTheWorldWars https://archive.org/details/IsTheHolocaustAHoax Hidden Holocaust Revealed - The 'Mass Graves' Holocaust - Survivors who Tell the Truth Official End of the 'Nazi's Used Human Skin' Holocaust Legend Auschwitz Was NOT a 'Death Camp' - Holocaust Survivor Testimony Death by Electrified Steam - The Original Holocaust Conspiracy Theory Hidden History - Actual Footage from Nazi 'Death Camps' THE AUSCHWITZ ALBUM - A Real-Life Look at What's Hidden There You may also like; https://archive.org/details/TheStoryOfYourEnslavement https://archive.org/details/TheAmericanDreamFilm-FullLength https://archive.org/details/TheAmericanFederalEmpire-changeIsOnTheHorizon
